relationships.paper: Planning-Driven Programming: A Large Language Model Programming Workflow
relationships.evidence: We quantify LLM hallucinations using two public metrics: FActScore (Min et al., 2023) and SAFE (Wei et al., 2024). In contrast, SAFE employs a language model as an investigative agent that iteratively employs Google Search queries to assess whether search results support the fact.
